name: Google
bio: Level up at I/O May 19 at 10am PT 🗓️

captions: The votes are in! Congratulations to the five #DoodleForGoogle National Finalists. Meet the contestants and check out their artwork at the link in bio.

Today's #GoogleDoodle encourages you to look up at the stars. Head to our homepage to see photos from @NASA's James Webb Space Telescope, including the deepest infrared photo of the universe ever taken 🤯 These awe-inspiring images will help astronomers study every phase of cosmic history, which spans a massive 13.5 billion years, and the mysteries beyond our galaxy.
Whether you’re celebrating with a backyard barbeque 🌭 or watching dazzling fireworks 🎆, have a happy Fourth of July. #GoogleDoodle
When each person can reach their full potential, it expands what's possible for everyone. That's why we're working to build a world where everyone can belong. Learn more at the link in bio.

Last night, we partnered with @MLB and @TeamGleason for an inclusive ceremonial first pitch in honor of Lou Gehrig Day. Watch as @stevegleasonofficial uses our Look to Speak technology to start last night's game. Try the app at the link in bio.

Our Head of Product Inclusion & Equity, Annie Jean-Baptiste, is helping people feel seen in the tools they use. Learn more about our efforts to build a world where everyone belongs at the link in bio.

“Pictures tell us about the world, so it’s important that they do that with a sense of accuracy and beauty that maps back to our real experiences.” — Florian Koenigsberger 

Florian leads our Image Equity Initiative, helping to make sure Pixel cameras capture everyone as they truly are. Learn more about our efforts to build a world where everyone belongs at the link in bio.
It’s all systems go at #GoogleIO. 🔌 Tune in tomorrow at 10am PT for our latest announcements, product demos and more at the link in bio.

This #TeacherAppreciationWeek and every week we're thankful for all the educators helping future generations grow. You can thank an educator for their encouragement, inspiration and support by sending one of the ready-to-share thank you cards from today’s Instagram Story. Tap the link in bio to hear @CCSSO National Teacher Of The Year’s Kurt Russell share his story, the importance of the teaching community and ways we're showing.

The sky’s the limit this year at #GoogleIO ✈️ 

Tune in May 11 at 10am PT to experience the future of tech. Sign up at the link in bio.

"After it became clear that Live Transcribe helps me to communicate, it became clear that we could extend it to help others,” Googler Dimitri Kanevsky says about his work as a speech research scientist. He’s developing technology like Live Transcribe to help people fully participate in the conversations around them. Learn more about our efforts to build a world where everyone belongs at the link in bio.
You’re invited! ✉️ Tune in to #GoogleIO on May 11 at 10 am PT to see our latest news, demos and more. RSVP today at the link in bio.
